title: Replace Internet Identity with OTP-based mobile authentication and redesign login/signup UI

requirements.text: Remove Internet Identity authentication system and replace with OTP-based mobile number authentication backend logic

quotes: Replace current authentication with OTP-based mobile number authentication

acceptanceCriteria: Backend accepts mobile number (10 digits) and generates a 6-digit OTP
Backend stores OTP temporarily with expiration time for verification
Backend provides method to verify OTP and authenticate user
Each mobile number maps to a unique user account
Authentication tokens or session management is implemented for authenticated users

requirements.text: Update backend user profile model to store mobile number (10 digits) as the primary identifier instead of Internet Identity principal

quotes: Each mobile number creates a unique account
Store user data separately in database

acceptanceCriteria: User profile includes mobile number field (10-digit string)
User profile includes Full Name field (text)
User profile includes Class/Course field (text)
Mobile number is unique and serves as primary user identifier
All existing user data relationships (subjects, chapters, study sessions) are linked to mobile number

requirements.text: Implement backend method to send OTP to mobile number (placeholder/mock implementation for OTP delivery)
acceptanceCriteria: Backend method accepts 10-digit mobile number
Method generates random 6-digit OTP
OTP is stored with mobile number and timestamp for verification
Method returns success status (actual SMS sending can be mocked)
OTP expires after a reasonable time (e.g., 5 minutes)

requirements.text: Implement backend method to verify OTP and create authenticated session

quotes: OTP verification screen after clicking Send OTP

acceptanceCriteria: Backend method accepts mobile number and 6-digit OTP
Method validates OTP matches stored value and is not expired
Method returns authentication token or session identifier on success
Method returns error if OTP is invalid or expired
Failed verification attempts are tracked to prevent brute force

requirements.text: Implement backend method to check if mobile number is registered and handle new user signup flow

quotes: If mobile number not registered, show: Input field: Full Name, Input field: Class / Course, Button: "Create Account"

acceptanceCriteria: Backend method checks if mobile number exists in user database
Method returns registration status (registered or new user)
For new users, backend accepts Full Name and Class/Course during signup
New user profile is created with mobile number, name, and class/course
Signup method returns authentication token for immediate login

requirements.text: Replace frontend Internet Identity login with mobile number OTP login UI on LoginPage

quotes: Login Section: Input field: Mobile Number (10 digits, numeric only), Button: "Send OTP"

acceptanceCriteria: LoginPage displays mobile number input field (numeric only, max 10 digits)
LoginPage includes "Send OTP" button
Mobile number input validates 10-digit format before enabling Send OTP button
Clicking Send OTP calls backend to generate and send OTP
Loading state is shown while OTP is being sent

requirements.text: Create OTP verification screen that appears after Send OTP is clicked, with 6-digit OTP input and Verify & Login button

quotes: OTP verification screen after clicking Send OTP, Input field: Enter 6-digit OTP, Button: "Verify & Login"

acceptanceCriteria: After Send OTP succeeds, LoginPage transitions to OTP verification screen
Screen displays 6-digit OTP input field (numeric only)
Screen includes "Verify & Login" button
Clicking Verify & Login calls backend to verify OTP
Loading animation is shown during verification
On successful verification, user is redirected to Dashboard or Signup flow

requirements.text: Create signup form UI for new users that collects Full Name and Class/Course after OTP verification

quotes: Signup (if new user): If mobile number not registered, show: Input field: Full Name, Input field: Class / Course, Button: "Create Account"

acceptanceCriteria: If backend indicates mobile number is not registered after OTP verification, show signup form
Form includes Full Name input field (text)
Form includes Class/Course input field (text)
Form includes "Create Account" button
Clicking Create Account submits data to backend and creates user profile
After account creation, user is redirected to Dashboard

requirements.text: Redesign LoginPage UI with light theme (white + blue color combination), app logo at top, title "Welcome to Tracky", and subtitle "Track your syllabus smartly"

quotes: Design: Simple student-friendly UI, Light theme (white + blue color combination), App logo at the top, Title: "Welcome to Tracky", Subtitle: "Track your syllabus smartly"

acceptanceCriteria: LoginPage uses white background with blue accent colors
App logo is displayed at the top center of the page
Title "Welcome to Tracky" is prominently displayed below logo
Subtitle "Track your syllabus smartly" is shown below title
Overall design is clean, minimal, and student-friendly
UI is fully mobile responsive

requirements.text: Update Layout component logout functionality to work with new OTP authentication system and clear authentication session
acceptanceCriteria: Logout button in Layout component clears OTP authentication session
Logout clears any authentication tokens or session data stored in browser
After logout, user is redirected to LoginPage
Logged out users cannot access protected routes without re-authenticating

requirements.text: Remove or deprecate useInternetIdentity hook and replace with OTP authentication hook throughout the application

quotes: Replace current authentication with OTP-based mobile number authentication

acceptanceCriteria: Create new authentication hook for OTP-based auth (e.g., useOTPAuth)
Replace all useInternetIdentity imports and usage with new OTP auth hook
Authentication state (logged in/out) is managed via new hook
Protected routes check OTP authentication status instead of Internet Identity

requirements.text: Update useActor hook to initialize backend actor with OTP authentication token instead of Internet Identity delegation

quotes: Store user data separately in database

acceptanceCriteria: useActor hook retrieves authentication token from OTP auth context
Backend actor is initialized with OTP authentication token
Actor requests include authentication credentials for access control
Hook invalidates queries when authentication state changes

requirements.text: Remove ProfileSetupPage component as user profile setup is now handled during signup flow

quotes: Signup (if new user): If mobile number not registered, show: Input field: Full Name, Input field: Class / Course

acceptanceCriteria: ProfileSetupPage route is removed from App.tsx
Profile setup logic (Full Name, Class/Course) is integrated into signup flow on LoginPage
Navigation no longer redirects to separate profile setup page
Users complete profile during initial signup immediately after OTP verification

requirements.text: Update App.tsx route protection logic to check OTP authentication status and redirect unauthenticated users to LoginPage
acceptanceCriteria: Protected routes check if user is authenticated via OTP system
Unauthenticated users are redirected to LoginPage
Authenticated users can access Dashboard, Subjects, and Syllabus Tracker pages
After successful login or signup, user is automatically redirected to Dashboard

constraints: Do not modify backend/main.mo actor structure; maintain single-actor architecture
Do not edit frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts directly; create new authentication hooks instead
Do not edit frontend/src/components/ui components; use them as-is or compose with them
Maintain existing user data relationships (subjects, chapters, study sessions) during authentication migration
Preserve all existing features and functionality except Internet Identity authentication
nonGoals: Actual SMS gateway integration for sending OTPs (use mock/placeholder implementation)
Two-factor authentication or additional security layers beyond OTP
Internationalization of phone number formats (only 10-digit Indian format)

required: Tracky app logo illustration with modern student-friendly design incorporating book and checkmark elements in blue color scheme (tracky-logo.dim_256x256.png)
